title: Software Engineer
shortDescription: We're on the lookout for a Software Engineer with 3–5 years of experience who brings solid fundamentals and a genuine enthusiasm for learning.
opportunity: We're on the lookout for a Software Engineer with 3–5 years of experience who brings solid fundamentals and, most importantly, a genuine enthusiasm for learning. You won't need to tick every box — we care far more about how you think, how you approach problems, and how you work with others than whether you've used every tool in our stack. This is a hybrid role based in Melbourne, with flexibility to work from home alongside time spent collaborating with the team in-office.
whatYoullBeDoing: Working closely with our technical leads and delivery team, you'll contribute to the design, development, and delivery of software solutions across a range of client engagements. Day to day, you might be building out API integrations, writing clean backend logic, collaborating on database design, or refining a frontend component — often all in the same week.
whatWereLookingFor: Server-side development using Microsoft .NET and C#
Database development skills including both SQL DDL and DML
ORM and data access frameworks such as Entity Framework Core, SQLite PCL
API development and integration — RESTful or otherwise
Architecture and design patterns such as dependency injection, CQRS and the Mediator pattern (e.g. MediatR)
Frontend development with one or more modern frameworks (Vue.js, Angular, React, Blazor or similar) and component libraries like Telerik or PrimeVue
Automated testing using frameworks such as xUnit and Playwright, including unit testing and mocking
CI/CD pipelines — experience here is a bonus, but familiarity is valued
bonusPoints: Working with Large Language Models (LLMs) — whether cloud-based or locally hosted
Exposure to AI tooling or building AI-integrated features
securityClearance: Given the nature of our work in defence and government, candidates must be eligible to apply for an Australian Defence Security Clearance. Australian citizenship is required to meet this eligibility.
